title: The Mutant Mobs Mod
description: This mod adds more mutant monsters
body:
![Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca100f65b7fbe8888fedcdc938cde49c946db75.png)

The Mutant Mobs Mod

This mod adds more mutant monsters

Feedback: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mutant-mobs-mod

Hunter gun is quite effective weapon to fight mutant monsters.
Hunter gun bullet is arrow.

Mutant Zombified Piglin

Health:200

Damage:10

armor:30

If you don't attack mutant zombified piglin, mutant zombified piglin won't attack you

 

Mutant Piglin Brute

Health:700

Damage: 12

Armor:?



Mutant Stray

Health:200

Damage:15

armor:20

Health:500

Damage:10

Armor:10

Health:100

Damage:50

Health:300

damage:15

Armor:10

Health:400

Damage:15

Armor:30

Health:270

Armor:100

Damage:30

Health:700

Damage:100

Health:900

Mutant Warden

Health:1024

Armor:100


Mutant Wither

Health:800

Armor:100

Damage:Error

This monster has the power of a simulated Command block, which is very dangerous, but because what this monster possesses is only a simulated Command Block, its ability to process command lines is very poor, not as good as a Command Block. That's why this monster cannot become Wither Storm.
Drop item (V1.1.0):
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

"A part of simulated command block".  A required item for the secret recipe

</details>

damage:15

Health:1000

damage:60

Mutant Ghast

Health:600

damage:Unclear

Armor:100

 

Gigaillager

He is the mastermind who created many mutant monsters, it is very difficult to defeat him, he has many different skills and be careful, his area of operation is mainly in jungle.
Drop item (V1.1.0):
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

"Mystery potion".  A required item for the secret recipe

</details>
